articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Why gold prices will continue to find support in near-term; check June 17, 2026 outlook
articles.description: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are holding strongly and buying from central banks is likely to continue supporting the yellow metal, says Vedika Narvekar, Research Analyst - Commodities & Currencies, Anand Rathi Shares and Stock Brokers.

articles.title: Indian Pharma Market to Sustain Double-Digit Growth: Equirus Report
articles.description: The Indian Pharmaceutical Market (IPM) is expected to continue its double-digit growth, with May'26 marking the sixth consecutive month of expansion at 12.1%. This growth is broad-based, with both chronic and acute therapies showing robust demand.

articles.title: Ignou question papers leaked on messaging app?
articles.description: Ignou is investigating allegations of question papers being sold on Telegram for its June-July 2026 term-end exams, with touts reportedly charging Rs 199 per subject. Despite complaints and screenshots shared, the university claims no evidence of a leak and has not cancelled any papers.

articles.description: Indian equities extended their recovery as easing US-Iran tensions and softer crude prices supported sentiment. Analysts highlighted Titagarh Rail, Rane Holdings, Bandhan Bank, CMPDI and Netweb Technologies, citing bullish chart patterns, improving momentum and strong technical indicators for near-term gains.

articles.title: MP Cabinet approves Rs 24,200 cr projects, boosts Indore Metro
articles.description: Madhya Pradesh CM Mohan Yadav's cabinet approved Rs 24,200 crore for state development. Key decisions include a revised Rs 19,472 crore for the Indore Metro, a new healthcare policy, and outsourcing of Community Health Centres in three districts.

articles.title: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut units for $2.7B, focuses on KFC, Taco Bell
articles.description: Yum Brands is selling its Pizza Hut businesses in and outside of China for a combined $2.7 billion. The company will net around $2.3 billion and will pivot to focus on expanding its KFC and Taco Bell operations in Mainland China.

articles.title: Census 2027: Field ops in Himachal, self-enumeration in Keralam, Nagaland
articles.description: Phase-I of Census 2027 has commenced, with Houselisting and Housing Census operations starting in Himachal Pradesh and self-enumeration in Keralam and Nagaland. Operations are ongoing in several states, while 23 states/UTs have already completed them.

articles.title: Gujarat Govt's Decade-Long Aid: Rs 22,733 cr for 1.36 cr Farmers
articles.description: Gujarat's government has provided Rs 22,733 crore in aid to over 1.36 crore farmers from 2015-26. The financial assistance helps them cope with crop losses caused by changing weather patterns like unseasonal rains and cyclones.

articles.title: InvIT market expands with new listings; cumulative distributions top Rs 91,000 crore
articles.description: Indias InvIT sector recorded strong growth in FY26, with Rs 7,719 crore distributed in Q4 alone and cumulative payouts crossing Rs 91,000 crore. Assets under management rose to Rs 7.1 lakh crore, while market cap and investor participation expanded, reflecting rising confidence in infrastructure-linked investment vehicles.

articles.title: India an attractive investment destination, growth robust: Ventura
articles.description: Ventura states India's long-term growth outlook is robust despite global uncertainties, buoyed by domestic demand and infrastructure spending. It's an attractive investment destination with promising sectors like healthcare, power, and tech.

articles.title: How a writer saved Rs 55,000 a year using 21 credit cards without paying interest
articles.description: A freelance translator uses 21 credit cards as a financial tool, saving Rs 50,000-55,000 annually by optimizing spending. Through meticulous planning, strategic card selection, and disciplined management, he avoids fees and interest, transforming credit cards from a borrowing facility into a cost-saving instrument.
